sources: Australian Taxation Office — Medicare Levy Surcharge income thresholds (FY 2024-25)
PrivateHealth.gov.au — Basic hospital policies (representative national midpoint)
Australian Government Department of Health, Disability and Ageing — Lifetime Health Cover & Age-Based Discount policy design
meta.notes: Hardcoded policy constants used to render the MLS tax-floor breakeven panel. Refresh annually (1 July) when the ATO updates MLS thresholds. The Basic premium midpoint is an order-of-magnitude proxy for the cheapest compliant hospital product; actual cheapest Basic policies vary by state and insurer (typically ~$900-$1,400/yr).
